reason_for_decision: The article passes by framing software and hardware as different layers of the same system and by giving a credible prioritization sequence for choosing where to invest first.
strengths: The article avoids the false software-versus-hardware binary and ties each layer to a distinct part of the mission.
Its bottleneck diagnosis and prioritization sequence are practical for real program decisions.
The piece stays disciplined about the limits of software when sensing geometry or physics are missing.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass. It is useful for budget and architecture discussions because it translates a vague debate into a concrete systems-engineering decision process.
